sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40875" key="e)piskirro/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπισκιρρόομαι</orth>, <sense id="n40875.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">become coagulated</tr_>, of blood, Poet.<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de herb.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
